name: Full Stack NextJs Application - Dictionary
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, acting as an interactive dictionary for informal expressions./ Employed SCSS for a modern UI design with a Dark Mode feature, enhancing user experience./Utilized Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management./ Enabled registered users to contribute by adding expressions and interacting via a like-dislike system.

name: Next Js Application - Portfolio
description: Developed using React.js and SCSS to showcase the developer’s profile and portfolio./Included an ’About’ page with a photograph, introduction, downloadable CV, and social media links for a comprehensive professional profile./Integrated a user-friendly ’Dark Mode’ toggle for a more comfortable viewing experience/Featured a ’Portfolio’ page displaying an array of projects, each with its utilized technologies, description, and links to livedemos and GitHub repositories.
